# amiGenomeAI
## AI Genomics & Genetics Companion
- Dual-engine (Grok + DeepSeek) with concordance verification
- Sequencing, bioinformatics, clinical genomics, CRISPR, pharmacogenomics
- EU AI Act Art. 50 compliant, GDPR stateless, Art. 9 genetic data respected
- API: https://amigenome-api-production.up.railway.app
- Chat endpoint: POST /companion/genome/chat
- Pro tier: €9.99/month via Stripe
